sentences.english: She was the first female prime minister in England.
sentences.korean: 영국 최초의 여성 총리였고 정치와 여성에 관한 사회적 규범을 깼어요.

sentences.english: She broke any normal social norms associated with politics and the female gender.
sentences.korean: / 깨뜨렸다 정치와 여성에 관한 사회적 규범을.

sentences.english: A historical person I admire is Mark Twain.
sentences.korean: 내가 존경하는 역사적 인물은 마크 트웨인이에요.

sentences.english: He has written a lot of fiction and is well known for 'The Adventures of Tom Sawyer.' I think he had a very unique perspective on the world.
sentences.korean: 많은 소설을 썼고 '톰 소여의 모험'으로 유명해요.

quiz.question: What does '혁명을 일으키다' mean in English?

sentences.english: Despite the extreme hardship he went through, he remained dedicated to his beliefs and became a very important spiritual leader for the whole African continent.
sentences.korean: 극심한 고난에도 신념에 헌신했고 아프리카 대륙 전체의 매우 중요한 영적 지도자가 되었어요.

sentences.english: Someone I admire historically would be Jimmy Hendrix.
I think he revolutionized rock music and many different styles of playing the guitar.
sentences.korean: 록 음악과 기타 연주의 여러 스타일에 혁명을 일으켰다고 생각해요.

sentences.english: He had a lot of strength and courage and was able to pull off the civil rights movement because he was a powerful leader and people looked at him to lead by example.
sentences.korean: 힘과 용기가 많았고 강력한 지도자여서 민권 운동을 성공시킬 수 있었어요.

quiz.question: What does '고난, 역경' mean in English?
